message:
refactor(workspace): remove extracted frankenterm-core and frankenterm-web crates

The frankenterm-core (terminal engine, parser, grid, scrollback, selection,
flow control, patch system) and frankenterm-web (WebGL renderer, glyph atlas,
input handling, WASM bindings, resize arbiter) crates have been extracted to
their own dedicated repository as part of the frankenterm project separation.

The frankentui workspace now contains only ftui-* crates (ftui, ftui-backend,
ftui-core, ftui-demo-showcase, ftui-extras, ftui-harness, ftui-i18n,
ftui-layout, ftui-pty, ftui-render, ftui-runtime, ftui-showcase-wasm,
ftui-simd, ftui-style, ftui-text, ftui-tty, ftui-web, ftui-widgets).

Removed files (44 total):
- crates/frankenterm-core/: Cargo.toml, src/*.rs (17 modules), benches/,
  tests/ (conformance, differential, model-check, proptest suites)
- crates/frankenterm-web/: Cargo.toml, src/*.rs (12 modules), benches/,
  tests/ (proptest input invariants, rescale repro corpus)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,33 +0,0 @@
-[package]
-name = "frankenterm-core"
-version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license = "MIT"
-description = "Host-agnostic VT/ANSI terminal engine: grid, parser, cursor, and scrollback."
-repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
-homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
-documentation = "https://docs.rs/frankenterm-core"
-readme = "../../README.md"
-
-[features]
-default = []
-ws-codec = ["dep:serde", "dep:serde_json"]
-
-[dependencies]
-bitflags = "2.10.0"
-serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"], optional = true }
-serde_json = { version = "1.0.145", optional = true }
-smallvec = "1.15.0"
-unicode-width = "0.2.2"
-
-[dev-dependencies]
-ftui-pty = { path = "../ftui-pty", version = "0.2.0" }
-ftui-extras = { path = "../ftui-extras", version = "0.2.0", features = ["terminal"] }
-criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
-proptest = "1.6.0"
-serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }
-serde_json = "1.0.145"
-
-[[bench]]
-name = "parser_patch_bench"
-harness = false
